subject: Fw: Selections
body:
have e mailed him about the bedroom changes and that we will hold off ordering any new items until the big pieces are resovled..let me know when you plan to go to
PB so that I can coordinate the meeting

-----Forwarded Message-----
>From: Jeffrey Gilman <jgilman@artefactousa.com>
>Sent: Jan 5, 2008 12:39 PM
>To: 'Jennifer Turner' <jenniferturner@mindspring.com>
>Subject: Selections
>
>Hi Jennifer,
>
>I am attaching some photos of the items proposed for the missing pieces you
>need for the bedrooms.
>
> 
>
>1)         2 Bee tables for bedroom #4 where the Arche side table did not
>fit (we will cancel the arche items and credit you). Finish MT Chocolate.
>
>2)         2 Milano Shelves for bedroom #3 for tv stacked two high. Finish
>P01 (dark wood finish).
>
>3)         2 Artic Component tables stacked two high. Finish C14 Black for
>the plasma tv.
>
> 
>
>I have these items on hold and can send you the order as soon as you approve
>them. I am also putting together pillows for the Sofa and some lamps for you
>to look at. I will send these in a separate e-mail.
>
>Thank you.
>
> 
>
> 
>
>Jeffrey
>
body_html:
have e mailed him about the bedroom changes and that we will hold off ordering any new items until the big pieces are resovled..let me know when you plan to go to
PB so that I can coordinate the meeting

-----Forwarded Message-----

From: Jeffrey Gilman jgilman@artefactousa.com
Sent: Jan 5, 2008 12:39 PM
To: 'Jennifer Turner' jenniferturner@mindspring.com
Subject: Selections

Hi Jennifer,

I am attaching some photos of the items proposed for the missing pieces you
need for the bedrooms.

  1.     2 Bee tables for bedroom #4 where the Arche side table did not

fit (we will cancel the arche items and credit you). Finish MT Chocolate.

  1.     2 Milano Shelves for bedroom #3 for tv stacked two high. Finish

P01 (dark wood finish).

  1.     2 Artic Component tables stacked two high. Finish C14 Black for

the plasma tv.

I have these items on hold and can send you the order as soon as you approve
them. I am also putting together pillows for the Sofa and some lamps for you
to look at. I will send these in a separate e-mail.

Thank you.

Jeffrey
